# Sgraal
> Memory Governance Protocol for AI agents

Sgraal validates AI agent memory before use.
API: https://api.sgraal.com
Docs: https://sgraal.com/docs
OpenAPI: https://api.sgraal.com/openapi.json

## Endpoints
- POST /v1/preflight — validate memory before agent action
- POST /v1/heal — fix problematic memories
- POST /v1/batch — validate multiple memories at once
